Feedback Text: This SanDisk memory card works perfectly with my phone. Fast transfer speeds and reliable storage.
Memory card stopped working after 2 months. Lost all my photos. Very disappointed.
Great capacity for the price. Easy to install in my Samsung Galaxy. Highly recommend.
The card is not compatible with my Samsung Galaxy S21. Tried everything. Does not read.
Storage card corrupted after firmware update on my Galaxy phone. Lost important data.
Perfect memory card. Works flawlessly. Fast read and write speeds for video recording.
Card keeps getting ejected from my phone slot. Compatibility issues with newer Samsung models.
Excellent storage solution. 256GB gives me plenty of space for all my photos and videos.
Amazing app! Super easy to navigate. The new update improved everything significantly.
App installs perfectly and runs smoothly. Reviews and ratings feature is very useful.
Interface is intuitive and clean. Love the dashboard layout. Very user friendly design.
App size is reasonable. Installs quickly. Feature set is decent for everyday tasks.
Navigation is confusing. Cannot find basic settings. Buttons do not respond sometimes.
Crashes frequently on startup. Lost all my data twice. Support team never responded.
Good app overall. Some features need polish but works well for daily use. Reasonable size.
Notification system is broken. App keeps running in background draining battery life.
This deodorant smells absolutely amazing. Natural fresh scent lasts all day. No irritation.
Love the natural ingredients. Gentle on sensitive skin. Scent is subtle and pleasant.
Skin reacted badly to this product. Caused rash after two days of use. Very irritating.
Natural deodorant that actually works. No bad odor throughout the day. Score.
Packaging leaking when arrived. Seal was broken. Product spilled inside the box.
Lovely scent but does not last more than 3 hours. Need to reapply several times daily.
Best gelato I have ever tasted. Creamy rich texture. The pistachio flavour is outstanding.
Too sweet for my taste. Would prefer less sugar. But texture is very creamy and smooth.
Delicious ice cream. Perfect consistency. Fresh ingredients. Definitely buying again.
Price is way too high for the small container size. Taste is good but not worth it.
